overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a desolate suburban outskirts area at dusk in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring low-rise industrial buildings, power lines, and a distant city skyline. The player walks down a dirt road, executes a 180-degree turn at the midpoint, and continues walking as the moon becomes visible against the twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desolate suburban road with scattered industrial buildings

events.description: camera executes a sharp 180-degree turn to face the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dirt road past low buildings and overhead power lines toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: multiple black power lines stretching across the sky attached to wooden poles
tall palm tree with sparse fronds visible against the sky
low single-story concrete building with flat roof and weathered walls
metal chain link fence running alongside the dirt road
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon including a distinctive tower
illuminated billboard with NC logo and red neon text
wooden utility pole with electrical transformers and multiple crossbars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate suburban dirt road at dusk, with the camera walking forward past industrial buildings and power lines. The sky displays warm orange and pink twilight hues with scattered clouds, while distant skyscrapers of Night City are visible on the horizon. The environment is empty of people and vehicles, creating an atmospheric, abandoned feeling.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial outskirts road with smokestacks and moonrise

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk down the road in the opposite direction, now facing the full moon and industrial buildings with smokestacks

entered.detail: large bright full moon visible in the twilight sky above the buildings
low industrial building with multiple smokestacks emitting white smoke
derelict dark-colored vehicle parked on the side of the road

segments.scene_description: After executing a 180-degree turn, the camera now faces the opposite direction with a large full moon visible in the twilight sky. The path continues through the industrial outskirts, passing buildings with smokestacks and an abandoned vehicle. The power lines and palm trees now appear from the opposite perspective as the walk continues through the empty, atmospheric environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a desolate suburban road that shifts from a view of a distant city skyline to a moonlit industrial horizon. It begins by walking forward past low-rise industrial buildings and power lines under a twilight sky filled with warm orange and pink hues, with the skyscrapers of Night City visible in the distance. As the camera executes a seamless 180-degree turn, the perspective flips to reveal a large full moon hanging in the darkening sky. The scene then continues along the empty dirt path, passing smokestacks and an abandoned vehicle while the surrounding palm trees and utility poles recede into the atmospheric gloom.
